hero.title: Transforming Technology into Value.
morphWords: Application Development with ABAP, RAP, CAP

bento.sectionSubtitle: From SAP consulting to AI, sustainability to financial automation — we deliver end-to-end value.

consulting.title: SAP Consulting
consulting.description: S/4HANA migration, BTP integration, ABAP & Fiori development, and process optimization to future-proof your enterprise.

edonusum.title: E-Transformation
edonusum.description: We manage all your e-transformation processes including e-Invoice, e-Dispatch, e-Archive with seamless SAP integration.

supplychain.title: Digital Supply Chain
supplychain.description: We digitize your planning, production, logistics, and supplier management processes to boost efficiency.

integration.title: Integration Solutions
integration.description: Bank integration, DBS, API connections, and U-ETDS to connect your systems end-to-end.

tech.title: Technology & Cloud
tech.description: S/4HANA, SAP BTP, ABAP/RAP/CAP, Fiori, and cloud strategies to manage your technological transformation.

rnd.title: Product Innovation
rnd.description: We develop niche products on the SAP ecosystem focused on AI and sustainability.

productSlides.title: AI e-Document Processing
productSlides.description: An AI model that automatically recognizes, classifies, and processes incoming e-invoices.

productSlides.title: Carbon Emission Calculator
productSlides.description: Carbon footprint measurement, emission tracking, and sustainability reporting.

productSlides.title: Bank Integration Platform
productSlides.description: Multi-bank integration, automated reconciliation, and payment management.

solutionSlides.title: Financial Management
solutionSlides.description: Cash flow forecasting, IFRS-compliant reporting, and multi-currency management.

solutionSlides.title: Logistics & Supply Chain
solutionSlides.description: Warehouse management, supply planning, and distribution process optimization.

solutionSlides.title: Production Planning
solutionSlides.description: Production scheduling, capacity planning, and material requirements management.

solutionSlides.title: Quality Management
solutionSlides.description: Quality control, inspection planning, and non-conformity management.
